title: ItzRealMe Vanilla Overlay
description: ItzRealMe's Official Overlay for people to use. It features many quality of life aspects in order to uplevel your PvP Skills.
body:
**ItzRealMe Overlay Edit** is the real pack that ItzRealMe uses.

This overlay has been used by many **high tiered players worldwide** and has been a **key pack within the community.**
If you want to get to a **higher level in Vanilla Crystal PvP then you HAVE to use this pack.**

This pack includes many different **quality of life** features that everyone would need such as: 

_**Small Totem Pop**_

_**Small Shield**_

_**Low fire**_
